title: Mr. Skeffington
writer: Julius J. Epstein, Elizabeth von Arnim
actors: Bette Davis, Claude Rains, Walter Abel
plot: Popular and beautiful Fanny Trellis enters into a loveless marriage with an older man, Jewish banker Job Skeffington, in order to save her beloved brother Trippy from an embezzlement charge.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 3 wins & 2 nominations total
